steps.t: The Wistmead wheat maze can be found in the Wistmead Harvest Festival space. Ermentrude Haybank has challenged you to get through the wheat maze, from…
The exit to the wheat maze is around here somewhere... or is it? You should try to find your way out of the wheat maze before the time runs out.
The Wistmead wheat maze can be found in the Wistmead Harvest Festival space. You should talk to Ermentrude Haybank at the wheat maze entrance.
